news.title: DigitalOcean (DOCN) Is Up 18.8% After Q1 Beat, Higher Outlook and AI-Native Cloud Launch - simplywall.st
news.summary: DigitalOcean reported a strong Q1 beat, raised its outlook, and launched an AI-native cloud, driving an 18.8% surge. Multiple analysts initiated or raised price targets, citing AI demand, while insider RSU grants and JPMorgan's 10.3% stake signal confidence.
